currentCohort.name: Next Cohort Interest List
currentCohort.meetingSchedule: Published before enrollment offers are accepted
currentCohort.weeklyWorkload: Varies by level and is confirmed before enrollment
currentCohort.statusMessage: Interest applications are open. Dates, meeting times, workload, and capacity will be published before any enrollment offer must be accepted.

levels.title: Python Foundations
levels.audience: Absolute beginners; no prior experience required
levels.goal: Master Python and computational thinking while building real projects.

levels.title: Applied AI & Machine Learning
levels.audience: Students who completed Level 1 or have baseline Python proficiency
levels.goal: Build applied projects with NumPy, pandas, scikit-learn, and an introduction to neural networks.

levels.title: Algorithms & Competitive Programming
levels.audience: Intermediate to advanced students preparing for USACO Bronze through Silver
levels.goal: Learn core data structures, algorithmic patterns, contest strategy, and structured problem solving.

levels.title: Passion Project
levels.audience: Students who completed prior levels or demonstrate strong independent readiness
levels.goal: Create a portfolio-grade AI application, startup prototype, developer tool, or other ambitious technical project.
